title: Hypercorrelated
description: A small addon to Excorrelation that adds some useful late-game components.
body:
**Hypercorrelated** is an addon mod for [Excorrelation](https://modrinth.com/mod/excorrelation) that adds a few end-game items for your storage system and not much else.

**Note**: Excorrelation for 1.20.1 is _not yet on Modrinth_, and can only be compiled from source at the moment. Please do so before making an issue on whatever git we're using that says "your mod doesn't work".

Made because we wanted a silly "end-game" Exco thing for our personal pack.

The mod adds:

- 128MiB and 192MiB drives (huge)
- 16KiB, 64KiB, 128KiB, and 256KiB memory (memory _is_ very handy, after all!)
**Note 2:** 128KiB and 256KiB memory don't have recipes yet.
- Extremely High Density and Absurdly High Density Platters (expensive)
- Violite, a new end-game material used in the final tier of system components.
